name: vscode-launchpad — builder
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev build-essential curl wget file libxdo-dev libssl-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev; pipx install uv 2>/dev/null || true; uv tool install 'git+https://github.com/derio-net/super-fr#subdirectory=packages/fr' || true; npm install

vk.purpose: local Tauri desktop builds (npm run tauri:build:full); Rust toolchain + Node sidecar bundling
